creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 191665
svn diff for x11/libfm

A recent install of x11-fm/pcmanfm indicated that it was
unmaintained. So I'm taking it, and this, as well as
x11/menu-cache, as all these are also unmaintained, and
part of x11-fm/pcmanfm

Please find the svn diff attached, to accomplish this.

Thanks!

--Chris
